item.description:
Release v4.16.0

Changes since v4.15.1

  • feat: implement tag-based tool filtering for sub-agents
  • feat(activity-heatmap): add token usage line chart
  • feat(agent-loop): recover from inline tool calls written to body text
  • feat(conversation-fork): continue a stuck chat in a new conversation
  • feat(core): add GitAccessCoordinator for libgit2 serialization
  • feat(core): add LogoRegistry singleton and SubAgent plugin API
  • feat(editor): add EditorNavigationContextMenuPlugin
  • feat(plugins): add ConversationRecoveryPlugin and update i18n files
  • fix: correct LumiToolTag naming in BugFixerAgent
  • fix: resolve GitAsyncBridge crash and cross-plugin libgit2 race condition
  • fix: show checking state instead of unavailable on model selector open
  • fix(file-tree): serialize libgit2 calls via GitAccessCoordinator
  • fix(i18n): AgentRAGPlugin localization cleanup
  • fix(keychain): retry transient keychain failures instead of treating them as missing API keys
  • fix(layout): restore persisted view container before first frame
  • fix(logo): ensure plugin logo displays in settings window
  • fix(logo): unify LogoRegistry singleton instance
  • fix(plugin): invoke willDisable lifecycle when plugin is disabled
  • fix(stepfun): remove codeIntelligence tag from SubAgent tool filters
  • fix(SuperLogKit): use pthread API for safe QoS detection on Swift Concurrency threads
